ACT 1 ROUTE: x4-x5 chain right side. F1 M, F2 M, F3 Unknown, F4 M, F5 M = 4-5 fights of deck-building runway, then F6 ELITE, F7 M, F8 REST, F9 Treasure, F10 SHOP, decision at F11: elite(x5)->M->elite(x6) chain for 3 total elites if deck+HP afford it, else middle path with F12/F13 rests. F15 rest before Hexaghost. Ledger: 72/80 start, ~5 cheap fights with Burning Blood netting ~0-5 HP each; should reach F6 elite at 60+. WIN%: 55% (=). WHY: good map - rest+shop right after first elite, flexible second-elite decision.

events.text: RECALL -- layer:heuristics, enemies/Gremlin Nob, Gremlin Nob

events.reasoning: FIGHT STRATEGY - Gremlin Nob (86 HP, Str 2 already at A3+). TYPE: Elite, zero-skills-after-T1 rule. WIN CON: 4-5 turn kill via Vuln-amped attacks (Hemo 22, Uppercut 19, Strikes 9). T1 (free, Bellow): drink Power Potion for a free Power, play Shockwave while Skills are safe (Weak 3 cuts Rush 14->10, Vuln 3 amps everything). T2+: attacks only, accept chip, Burning Blood +6 after. POTION PLAN: Power Potion now, Gambler's Brew held. RISK: skill-heavy hands -> play nothing, eat a 10. WIN%: 55% (=). WHY: Nob at A9 is the hardest Act1 elite for skills but deck has attack density + this is the dream T1 hand (both debuff skills castable safely... only energy for one).

HEXAGHOST PLAN (A9, ~264 HP). T1 Activate is free: play Evolve + drink Cultist Potion (Ritual +1 Str/turn - 12+ turn fight = +12 Str). T2 Divider 6x(HP/12+1): block hard, Block Potion if needed. Cycle: Spot Weakness+ on attack turns (+4 Str x2 copies), Shockwave+ ON FIRST INFERNO (Weak 5), Shockwave on second. Sever Soul clears Burns from hand + 16 dmg. Burns: block absorbs them end-of-turn - overblock by 2/Burn in hand. Strikes are 9 base + Str. KEY RISK: second Inferno ~42; aim to kill before cycle 2 completes. WIN%: 60% (=). WHY: 3 of 4 prep boxes checked (Weak sources, Burns mgmt, scaling); HP entry 68/80 slightly under full.

events.reasoning: Kill-speed line: Str 4 + Immolate 25 AOE (Mystic to 26). Take 14. Mystic dies T2 before heal-loop starts.
Bash+ 14 >= 10: Mystic DEAD - no more heals/buffs
0E left, 17 incoming at 19 HP - fish for a free block skill
Bloodletting: -3 HP for 2E = two Defends (10 block) vs 17
30 incoming, 9 HP, max block 10 - no survival line. Escape, keep the run.

Smoke Bomb saved the run: Centurion's 10x3 Fury at 9 HP had no block answer. Lost the fight rewards, kept everything else. Now 15/80 - route MUST be non-combat: F9 Treasure -> F10 Unknown -> F11 REST. WIN%: 40% (-15). WHY: HP crisis mid-Act 2, no potions except Duplication, gold thin. MARGIN NOTE: this deck's 4 Defends clump badly - in 3 fights straight T1 came up with zero block. A block-dense pickup (second Shrug/Impervious/Metallicize) matters more than another attack.

Bottle Immolate: innate 21+Str AOE every turn 1 (Collector torch heads, slavers, byrds)

events.command: play Heavy Blade 0; play Pommel Strike 0; end
events.translated: Heavy Blade → Sentry → Pommel Strike → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free turn. 14+12 = 26 into Sentry (42->16). Spheric slog second. (Note: Bottled Flame landed on Pommel, not Immolate - earlier grid misfire.)
Sentry to 16. Both enemies passive this turn - zero damage.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Hemokinesis 1; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Hemokinesis → Spheric Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Frail guts block (6 total) - take 16+2. Chip 12 into the 65 shell. T4: Shockwave+Bash+ strip all 3 Artifact charges, then Vuln race.

events.command: play Bash 1; play Shockwave 1; play Hemokinesis 1; end
events.translated: Bash+ → Spheric Guardian → Shockwave → Spheric Guardian → Hemokinesis → Spheric Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Artifact stripped to 0 (Bash+ vuln eats 1, Shockwave eats 2). 22 dmg -> shell at 28. Take 13. Next turn debuffs finally LAND.
Energy misbudget (Shockwave needs 2). Hemo 12: shell to 28.
Next card played twice - doubling Immolate
Pommel 12: Spheric to 6, block gone (Barricade has nothing to keep)
Take 22 -> 9 HP. T6: any attack kills before he acts.
Power Through: 15 block - biggest block card, fixes the defense gap; Evolve eats the Wounds
Forced unknown at 15 HP - praying for an event
F14 forced fight before the rest
24 in vs 17 HP, no block drawn - need a defensive colorless
Finesse: free 2 block + draw - with Shockwave+ Weak this turns lethal into survivable
Weak 5: 24 -> 18. Vuln 5 for the kill phase.
Take 16 -> 1 HP. T2: full block or burst.
Free turn (Frail spores incoming, no dmg). Immolate 37: Plant to 45. Race is on - Vuln 4 turns left.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Shrug It Off; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Shrug It Off → End Turn
events.reasoning: Frail caps block at 12 vs 18. No kill line (45 HP), Hemo = suicide at 1 HP. Max block + pray. WIN%: 10%. WHY: cornered by spores turn.
